Title: Open materials only
Methods
Participants (N = 64) were randomized to intervention or control. Study materials are openly available at https://osf.io/materials1.
Results
The intervention effect was significant, p = 0.03, Cohen's d = 0.35.
Discussion
The findings suggest a limited effect.
References
Doe, J. (2020). Example. https://doi.org/10.1000/example13
